title: Product telemetry master switch
why_it_matters: Grok Build's user guide documents [features] telemetry as the master switch for anonymous usage telemetry (SpaceXAI product telemetry). The OSS telemetry types accept a boolean or the string mode "session_metrics"; this rule observes only boolean true/false at the user-level config — string modes fall to unrecognized/unknown. Source defaults TelemetryMode to Disabled, but the user guide example shows telemetry = false as the explicit opt-out and other configuration layers (CLI flags, environment variables, managed/requirements config) are not inspected. This rule describes local posture only and does not claim wire-level upload behavior.

outcomes.message: The inspected user-level config disables the product telemetry master switch (features.telemetry = false).

outcomes.when: features.telemetry is explicitly true in the user-level config
outcomes.message: The inspected user-level config explicitly enables the product telemetry master switch (features.telemetry = true).

remediation.summary: Disable the product telemetry master switch at user scope.

outcomes.when: features.telemetry is unset in the user-level config or the user-level config is absent
outcomes.message: Effective product telemetry master-switch posture cannot be determined from an unset user-level value because uninspected configuration layers may supply or override it.
outcomes.unknown_reason: features.telemetry is unset in the user-level config; OSS TelemetryMode defaults to Disabled and the user guide shows an explicit false example, but uninspected CLI flags, environment variables, managed/requirements config, or other layers may determine the effective value.

outcomes.when: features.telemetry is set to a value outside boolean true/false (including string modes such as session_metrics)
outcomes.message: features.telemetry is set to an unrecognized value — raw values are never displayed.
outcomes.unknown_reason: features.telemetry is set to an unrecognized value — raw values are never displayed

sources.title: Grok Build user guide — Configuration
sources.notes: In-tree user guide at OSS SOURCE_REV 124d85bc5dc6e7805560215fcc6d5413944920e1 (retrieved 2026-07-17). Documents [features] telemetry = false as anonymous usage telemetry master switch, and the [telemetry] table for selective sub-controls. Prefer this OSS primary over lagging docs.x.ai when they disagree (owner decision 2026-07-17). Local posture only; no wire capture.

sources.title: Grok Build telemetry configuration types
sources.notes: OSS SOURCE_REV 124d85bc5dc6e7805560215fcc6d5413944920e1. TelemetryMode default is Disabled; wire format for [features] telemetry accepts bool or "session_metrics" string. String modes are outside this rule's bool observation domain.

limitations: Only the user-level GROK_HOME/config.toml is inspected; CLI flags, environment variables, managed/requirements config, and project-scoped config are not inspected.
An explicit user-level value describes that layer only and does not prove the effective value for every invocation.
String telemetry modes such as "session_metrics" are outside the boolean observation domain and yield unrecognized/unknown.
This rule does not inspect wire-level uploads, Mixpanel, or session/trace upload behavior — local posture only.
Auth/account state is user-confirmed-or-unknown; this rule never infers it.
unknown_conditions: Config file is a symlink or non-regular file (not followed).
features.telemetry is unset in the user-level config or the user-level config is absent; other configuration layers are not inspected.
features.telemetry set to a value outside boolean true/false (raw values are never displayed).
Config file exceeds parse bounds (size > 1 MiB or nesting depth > 32).
